use_cases: FAQ sections on help centers or documentation sites
Collapsible content sections for detailed information display
Settings panels with expandable preference categories
Product detail pages with expandable specifications
ai_summary: A shadcn-style accordion component built on Radix UI primitives providing accessible, keyboard-navigable collapsible content sections. Features smooth expand/collapse animations with a rotating chevron indicator and supports nested accordion items. Clean, minimalist design with border separators suitable for FAQ pages, settings panels, and documentation sites.
